notes: v0.5.9 — fix Live Render preview cell mis-assignment introduced in 0.5.8. push_live_render_frame had a backward-compat branch that triggered whenever the third arg was nil; the multi-view kick called it with (geom, shaded, nil) before the bg thread finished, which incorrectly shuffled the args (geom PNG ended up in the Shaded cell, etc.). Removed the legacy 2-arg form entirely — all callers now pass three explicit args. Hidden Line cell now actually shows the Hidden-Line capture; Shaded cell shows the Shaded capture.
